# Project Checklist Template

Use this checklist when starting a new project.

## Planning

- [ ] Product goal is clear.
- [ ] Frontend repo exists.
- [ ] Backend repo exists.
- [ ] AI features are documented.
- [ ] REST API boundary is documented.
- [ ] Agent rules are copied into the repo.

## Backend

- [ ] Laravel REST API scaffolded.
- [ ] MySQL configured.
- [ ] Redis configured.
- [ ] Auth configured.
- [ ] RBAC configured.
- [ ] Tenant strategy documented if needed.
- [ ] Services added for business logic.
- [ ] API Resources added for responses.
- [ ] Seeders and factories added.
- [ ] Request and audit logging added.
- [ ] Email notifications added where needed.
- [ ] PHPUnit covers core functionality.

## Frontend

- [ ] Next.js scaffolded.
- [ ] TypeScript configured.
- [ ] Tailwind configured.
- [ ] Coss UI/Base UI approach documented.
- [ ] Axios API client added.
- [ ] Shared `types/` folder added.
- [ ] Reusable UI components added.
- [ ] Loading, empty, error, success, and disabled states added.
- [ ] AI assist UI added where useful.
- [ ] Vitest covers core frontend logic.
- [ ] Playwright covers critical flows.
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness verified.

## Portfolio Proof

- [ ] Live URL.
- [ ] Public GitHub repo.
- [ ] Screenshots.
- [ ] Architecture diagram.
- [ ] Database diagram where relevant.
- [ ] Case study.
- [ ] README updated.
